title: Portfolio Website
description: A personal portfolio site built with semantic HTML and modern CSS as part of DSC 106.

title: Advanced CSS Styling
description: Responsive and accessible web design using CSS Grid, Flexbox, and custom properties.

title: JavaScript Interactions
description: Dynamic web interactions including dark mode switching, auto-generated navigation, and localStorage persistence.

title: Data-Driven Projects Page
description: Projects page dynamically rendered from a JSON data file using JavaScript fetch and DOM manipulation.

title: SoleSavings
description: A full-stack sneaker price tracking platform using Python, Flask, and SQLite, aggregating listings across multiple resale and retail marketplaces.

title: MNMIZE – Achieving Zero Carbon Homes
description: A web application that calculates and tracks real-time CO₂e from plastic consumption of households, with a dashboard for tracking over time.

title: Customer Targeting Model
description: Identified high-value prospective customers for merchants using FAISS vector similarity search based on existing customer behavior and transaction patterns.

title: SME Cashflow Prediction Model
description: Forecasted SME cashflows using historical financial data, leveraging Meta's Prophet time-series forecasting library.

title: Document OCR Pipeline
description: OCR pipelines for legal and immigration forms using Google Cloud Document AI, achieving 90%+ field-level accuracy across 6 document types.

title: Document Identification Service
description: AI-powered document classification service using Claude LLM to label diverse legal documents across 10+ US visa types.

title: DataHacks 2025
description: Directed UCSD's largest hackathon with 250+ participants, managing a $12,000 budget, corporate sponsorships, and cross-functional team coordination.

title: Data Monetization Platform
description: Designed data insight KPIs for a bank's Data-as-a-Service initiative, enabling merchants and SMEs to leverage transaction data.
